name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (per v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0+). v0.10.5 ships the first pytest integration test suite for the wpx-* tools (plugins/sulis-execution/scripts/tests/, mirroring sea/probe pattern) along with two bug fixes the tests surface: (Bug 1) wpx-pipeline now detects 'branch already merged to dev' via the gh compare API and skips the merge step instead of crashing with RuntimeError on GitHub's 409 response from POST /merges; (Bug 2) wpx-index's _find_wp_table is now heading- and column-aware — finds the table after '## Work Packages' first, or by Status+Primitive columns, instead of blindly grabbing the first |ID|-headed table (which in real projects is often a primitive-summary table). 41 tests across unit/ (parsers, table helpers, section helpers) and integration/ (one module per tool; mocked gh CLI; real local git; cross-tool subprocess dispatch). Two regression locks pinned. New .github/workflows/sulis-execution-tests.yml runs the suite on every push + PR. Pytest is the only dev dependency; wpx-* tools remain stdlib-only at runtime. v0.10.4 fixed emit_ok exit_code + no-branch-CI hang. v0.10.3 closed the auto-draft INDEX-registration gap. v0.10.2 fixed wpx-step12 dispatcher correctness. v0.10.1 fixed wpx-* tool discoverability. Self-heals in-scope failures via OODA + Five Whys per executor-loop-standard.md; escalates out-of-scope failures via structured BLOCKER records. Follows git-workflow-standard.md. Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03.
